title: Wilted, Chive-Infused Brazilian Post-workout Dish Bowl
description: A post-workout dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine, featuring wilted chives and a fermented sauce, served in a scallop shell.

ingredients.name: Brazilian Chimichurri Mix (fermented)
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade, no onion or garlic

instructions: Rinse and dry the scallop shells.
In a small saucepan, combine Brazilian Chimichurri Mix and 1 tbsp of water. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is warm and slightly thickened.
Arrange a layer of sliced prosciutto at the bottom of each shell.
Top with a layer of sliced cucumber, followed by a layer of cherry tomatoes.
Sprinkle shredded Minas cheese over the vegetables.
Dollop a spoonful of warm chimichurri sauce over the cheese.
Garnish with chopped chives and a dollop of sour cream.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Serve immediately, in the scallop shells.
